auth.title: TetherDNS
auth.subtitle: DNS & DDNS Management System
auth.login_subtitle: Log in to your TetherDNS dashboard
auth.err_required: Please provide both username and password.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor your Cloudflare accounts, DNS zones, and DDNS activities.
dashboard.scale_desc: Connect additional Cloudflare accounts and manage multiple zones from a single pane of glass.

accounts.title: Cloudflare Accounts
accounts.subtitle: Manage your Cloudflare API tokens and connections.
accounts.add_modal_desc: Provide your API credentials to authorize TetherDNS.
accounts.label_hint: A memorable name for this connection.
accounts.token_hint: Tokens are securely encrypted before saving to the database.
accounts.err_all_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
accounts.err_occurred: An error occurred while verifying the token.
accounts.delete_warning: You must remove all zones associated with this account before unlinking it.

zones.title: DNS Zones
zones.subtitle: Manage domains linked to your Cloudflare accounts.
zones.no_accounts_warning: You need to link a Cloudflare account first before adding domains.
zones.add_modal_desc: Register a new domain to manage via TetherDNS.
zones.account_hint: The Cloudflare account where this domain is hosted.
zones.domain_hint: Enter the apex domain exactly as it appears in Cloudflare.
zones.import_modal_desc: Automatically fetch and import all domains from a Cloudflare account.
zones.import_info: Select an account to sync its zones. Domains already managed by TetherDNS will be skipped.
zones.delete_modal_text: This will stop TetherDNS from managing this domain. DNS records on Cloudflare will remain intact and will not be deleted.
zones.err_domain: A valid domain name is required.

records.title: DNS Records
records.subtitle: Manage A, AAAA, and CNAME records. Toggle DDNS to automate IP updates.
records.add_modal_desc: Publish a new DNS record to Cloudflare.
records.edit_modal_desc: Modify the properties of this DNS record.
records.name_hint: Use '{'@'}' for the root domain or enter a specific subdomain.
records.ddns_hint: TetherDNS will dynamically update this record whenever your public IP changes.
records.delete_warning: Warning: This action will permanently delete the record from Cloudflare. This cannot be undone.
records.err_required: Hostname and target value are required.
records.api_desc: Trigger a manual DDNS update for this record by sending a GET/POST request to this endpoint.
records.revoke_warning: Revoking this token will immediately break any external scripts or routers currently using this Webhook URL.

logs.title: Activity Logs
logs.subtitle: Track historical DDNS updates and system events.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure global application behavior and notifications.
settings.subtitle_desc: Manage administrative access and background daemon intervals.
settings.ddns_interval_hint: How frequently TetherDNS should poll for public IP changes.
settings.notif_subtitle: Receive instant alerts for IP changes and sync failures.
settings.add_notif_overlay: Define where the system should send webhook notifications.
settings.label: Channel Name
settings.users_subtitle: Manage credentials for accessing the TetherDNS dashboard.
settings.add_user_overlay: Provision access for a new system administrator.
settings.err_webhook: A valid Webhook URL is required.
settings.err_line: A LINE Notify Token is required.
settings.err_user_pass: Both username and password must be provided.

audit.title: Audit Trail
audit.subtitle: Immutable ledger of all administrative actions.

security.title: Security Configurations
security.subtitle: Enhance account security with Two-Factor Authentication (2FA).
security.totp_desc: Require a time-based code from an authenticator app during login.
security.setup_desc: Scan this QR code using Google Authenticator, Authy, or your preferred TOTP app. Alternatively, manually input the secret key below:
security.disable_desc: Enter a valid authenticator code to authorize the removal of Two-Factor Authentication.

api_tokens.title: Personal Access Tokens
api_tokens.subtitle: Generate tokens to interact with the TetherDNS REST API.
api_tokens.important_desc: This token grants API access to your system. Copy it immediately. For security reasons, it will never be displayed again.
api_tokens.name_hint: Where will this token be used? (e.g., Home Assistant, Cron job)
api_tokens.no_tokens: No access tokens have been issued.

setup.title: System Initialization
setup.subtitle: Create the root administrator account to bootstrap the platform.
setup.err_fields: All fields are required to proceed.
setup.err_match: The passwords provided do not match.
setup.created: Root administrator account has been provisioned.
setup.err_occurred: A critical error occurred during initialization.

footer.powered_by: Powered by the Cloudflare v4 API
footer.brand_description: Enterprise-grade Cloudflare DNS management and dynamic IP synchronization platform.

propagation.title: Global DNS Propagation
propagation.desc: Verifying DNS cache status across global resolvers for {name}

ddns_warning.title: ⚠️ Record Type Modification
ddns_warning.subtitle: Type conversion required for DDNS
ddns_warning.desc1: Dynamic DNS requires an 'A' or 'AAAA' record to point to a valid IP address.
ddns_warning.desc2: The record '{name}' is currently of type '{type}'. Enabling DDNS will permanently convert it to type 'A'.
